brand.name: QUINNIX STUDIO
brand.tagline: We craft digital experiences that move people.
brand.subtagline: A creative studio building brands and digital products for ambitious companies.

hero.headline: We craft digital experiences that move people.
hero.subtext: A boutique creative studio obsessed with craft — building brands, websites, and digital products for companies that want to stand out.

about.headline: We're a small, mighty studio obsessed with craft.
about.body: Founded with a simple belief: great design is the best business advantage. We partner with ambitious brands at every stage — from early-stage startups finding their voice to established companies reinventing themselves.

services.title: Brand Identity & Strategy
services.description: Logo, visual system, brand guidelines, and the strategic positioning that makes it all mean something.

services.title: Web Design & Development
services.description: Pixel-perfect design and clean code. Sites that are fast, accessible, and built to convert.

services.title: Art Direction & Storytelling
services.description: Visual language, photography direction, and narrative systems that give your brand a coherent world.

services.title: Motion & Animation
services.description: Micro-interactions, scroll animations, and full motion packages that bring static design to life.

services.title: Creative Technology
services.description: Custom digital experiences, interactive installations, and tech-forward concepts that push boundaries.

services.title: SEO & Content Strategy
services.description: Organic growth through thoughtful content architecture, keyword strategy, and long-form writing.

testimonials.quote: Working with this studio completely transformed how we show up online. They understood our vision instantly and delivered beyond expectations.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: The attention to detail is unmatched. Every pixel, every word, every interaction — it all feels intentional. Our conversion rate tripled.
testimonials.author: Marcus Williams

testimonials.quote: They don't just execute briefs — they bring ideas and push back when something isn't right. That's rare, and exactly what we needed.
testimonials.author: Priya Nair
